message:
refactor(writing): integrate MathTooltip in Hoeffding article

Refactor Hoeffding article to use the unified MathTooltip component
instead of the article-specific HoeffdingMathTooltip wrapper.

hoeffding-article.tsx:
- Import MathTooltip and TooltipVariant from shared component
- Import getHoeffdingMath from lib for term lookups
- Create local MT wrapper that maps hex colors to variant names
- Support for cyan, purple, rose, amber, emerald, and blue variants
- Pass simple prop through to underlying MathTooltip

hoeffding-math-tooltip.tsx:
- Minor formatting adjustments for consistency
- Align with shared tooltip infrastructure patterns

This consolidation reduces code duplication and ensures consistent
tooltip behavior across all article components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
